_comment: This pack is deliberately INVALID. It exists to exercise the Data Pack v1 validator/preview UI (Admin -> Research -> Import), not to be imported for real. Each row below has exactly one intentional problem: substances[0] is missing the required 'slug' field; substances[1] has a 'classification' value outside CLASSIFICATIONS_V1 ('Extreme'); stacks[0] has only 1 component (stacks require 2-10 distinct components); findings[0] has no source_pmid/source_doi/source_url so it cannot resolve to a source; findings[1] has a 'direction' value outside FINDING_DIRECTIONS_V1 ('sideways'). Expect the preview to mark all five rows 'invalid'.
label: Broken pack - validator test fixture

substances.name: No Slug Substance
substances.description: This substance row is missing the required slug field and should be marked invalid.

substances.name: Bad Classification Substance
substances.description: This substance row uses a classification value that is not in the allowed enum (Everyday | Clinical | Frontier | Unknown).

stacks.name: Too Few Components Stack
stacks.description: This stack lists only one component. Stacks require between 2 and 10 distinct substance slugs.

sources.title: Placeholder Source For Broken Finding Test

findings.finding_summary: This finding has no source_pmid, source_doi, or source_url and should fail validation because it cannot resolve to a source.
This finding uses an invalid direction value that is not in the allowed enum (increased | decreased | no_clear_change | mixed | unclear).
